title: Inducing Resistance to Freezing and Desiccation in Plants by Decenylsuccinic Acid
publisher: American Association for the Advancement of Science (AAAS)
abstract: Decenylsuccinic acid induces resistance to desiccation, cold, and frost in young bean plants. When decenylsuccinic acid is sprayed on flowering peach, apple, and pear trees, most of the flowers are resistant to a frost of —6°C.
